name: orbit-atlas
description: Interactive developer onboarding system powered by GitLab Orbit knowledge graphs.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @orbit-atlas/shared && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @orbit-atlas/api" "npm run dev -w @orbit-atlas/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @orbit-atlas/shared && npm run build -w @orbit-atlas/api && npm run build -w @orbit-atlas/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @orbit-atlas/shared && npm run typecheck -w @orbit-atlas/api && npm run typecheck -w @orbit-atlas/web
